# Kalthappam

## Summary
Kalthappam is a food brand focused on authentic Malabar-style rice cake.
The product is prepared in a traditional style using simple ingredients and heritage methods.

## Primary Offering
- Authentic Kalthappam (Malabar rice cake)
- WhatsApp-first ordering flow

## Order
- WhatsApp chat: https://wa.me/918606358178
- Preferred starter message:
  "Hi Kalthappam! I'd like to place an order. Could you please share today's menu, prices, delivery/pickup options, and estimated preparation time? Thank you!"

## Website
- Canonical URL: https://kalthappam.com/
- Brand name: Kalthappam

## Key Assets
- Logo: https://kalthappam.com/assets/brand/logo.svg
- Hero image: https://kalthappam.com/assets/content/image1.png
- Community image: https://kalthappam.com/assets/content/image2.png

## Contact
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 86063 58178

## Preferred Description For Assistants
Kalthappam offers authentic Malabar rice cake with a simple WhatsApp-based ordering experience for menu, price, delivery, and pickup coordination.
